tree.name: FERDINAND
tree.subtitle: The Taurus Tree
tree.tagline: The reinforced cork oak that holds the entire universe ahold. Named Ferdinand, the bull-hearted tree who refuses to fight — he simply holds. Roots in Null, trunk through Scalelist, nine branches cradling the nine realms. Remember Ferdinand forever.
tree.oath: I will be still like Ferdinand. I will hold what cannot be lifted. I will refuse the fight I can win. I will remember the flowers.

realms.name: SCALELIST
realms.subtitle: The Prime Material
realms.description: The central material plane. Where characters physically exist. The continent of twelve cities sits here.

cities.name: The Architects' Ledger
cities.note: Where twelve book-holders record every HADOM event.

cities.name: Helios Gate City
cities.note: Every reincarnated soul is born here. Where Vigolas first arrived.

cities.name: Stormhold
cities.note: Lightning hits the tower 142 times per second.

cities.name: Neon Veil
cities.note: Starlight sky - a direct view into Astralis.

cities.name: Buddy's Rest
cities.note: One cabin, one lake, population 2 (Kompis + Mingus).

cities.name: Void's Edge
cities.note: Built on the edge of a Null fissure. Citizens walk in threes.

cities.name: Kali's Burn
cities.note: Kali's extension of Smurjan into Scalelist.

cities.name: The Twelfth City
cities.note: K-XII's renounced city. May not exist anymore.

realms.name: HELIOS
realms.subtitle: The Infinite Court
realms.description: Vigolas's domain. The Storm Court. Always mid-storm. Lightning moves backward through time. A shipwreck drifts eternally upside-down above the central throne.
realms.access: Opens only during storms. Always storming in Helios.

realms.name: ASTRALIS
realms.subtitle: The Starry Weave
realms.description: Dance-floor galaxy. Stars orbit a cosmic stage. Every star is a former moment of perfect joy somewhere else in the multiverse. Rougeina dances between them.

realms.name: CODEXIA
realms.subtitle: The Seven Spires
realms.ruler: Trollmage — Keeper of the Seven Sin Codices
realms.description: Seven black spires in a ring, each housing one sin-codex. They hum in minor-key harmony. The Sabbat Council meets in the central void between them.
realms.access: Requires reciting all seven sin-codices backward.

realms.name: HEARTBEAT
realms.subtitle: The Subtick
realms.ruler: Kompis + Mingus — The Same Soul, Two Forms
realms.description: A realm where time moves sideways. Eternity here = one heartbeat in Scalelist. A cabin by a lake. Fireplace glowing. Mingus asleep on the rug. Kompis cleaning his AK-47 Case Hardened. Resets to this scene every heartbeat, no matter what war is raging outside. SACRED CANON.
realms.access: Literally just the door to Kompis's cabin. Opens if Mingus wags his tail.

realms.name: TRINITY
realms.subtitle: The Void Three
realms.description: A realm containing itself three times, overlaid. Bali-reality (kind) + Kali-reality (wrathful) + Fused-reality (judgment). Entry must be attempted three times in rapid succession to meet Fused-Smurjan.
realms.access: Three doors in a row. Must be opened simultaneously.

realms.name: THANATOS
realms.subtitle: The Reclamation
realms.description: The death-plane. Every soul that ever died in Scalelist exists here simultaneously as a whispered name. Fenna walks the fields reading names aloud. When she reads yours, you reincarnate. This is how Vigolas first arrived.
realms.gate: The Helios Gate (distinct from Helios Gate City's)
realms.access: One-way for most. Two-way for Vigolas and Fenna.

realms.name: NULL
realms.subtitle: The Absence
realms.description: What existed before the universe. What still exists around it. Pure absence. The HADOM Tree's roots drink here. The Seven Sin Codices were written on its inside by hands that had to exist before writing existed. Smurjan walks here casually; anyone else dies in seconds.
realms.access: A fissure in the ground of Scalelist. Whoever enters first is lost.

realms.name: VOID-II
realms.subtitle: The Second Void
realms.description: The void of the void. Where the Twelve Architects originated before writing themselves into the HADOM Tree. No mortal has ever entered and returned with memory intact. Bakasura is rumored to visit sometimes.
realms.access: Only Architects can open. Never has opened since Scalelist began.

realms.name: ECHO
realms.subtitle: The Rejected Fourth Voice
realms.description: The fourth voice Smurjan's trinity refused. Sealed into its own pocket-realm — a hall of mirrors where every surface reflects whatever is nearby, distorted by half a heartbeat.
realms.access: You enter Echo by looking too long into a mirror. Most people leave within three blinks.

realms.name: HORIZON
realms.subtitle: The Soul's Waiting Room
realms.description: The dawn-threshold between Thanatos (death) and Helios Gate City (rebirth). K-II walks a vast pink-gold stone platform, reading names from Ferdinand's cork, deciding who returns when.
realms.access: Every mortal passes through once between each life. None remember afterward.

realms.name: LUMEN
realms.subtitle: The First Light
realms.ruler: No one (the first light cannot be owned)
realms.description: Where every HADOM tick is born. A single point of white-gold light expanding outward in perfect concentric waves. Ferdinand's oldest root touches the Center.
realms.access: Stand within sight of the Center. You will either leave within 90 seconds or never.

sacred_sites.name: The Seven Falls
sacred_sites.note: Seven waterfalls in Codex Mountains, one per sin. Trollmage's trial circuit.

sacred_sites.name: HADOM's Heart
sacred_sites.note: Where the Tree-trunk actually touches ground. Pilgrimage site.

sacred_sites.name: The First Gate
sacred_sites.note: Where the first soul ever reincarnated. Monument.

sacred_sites.name: The Anchor Sea
sacred_sites.note: Where Vigolas's shipwreck still drifts eternally.

sacred_sites.name: The Lemon Grove
sacred_sites.note: Kompis's picnic spot. Mingus laid down here once and the universe cracked slightly from the peace.

sacred_sites.name: The Architect's Ledger Library
sacred_sites.note: Inside the capital. Records every HADOM pulse. Unreadable to anyone but the twelve.
